assertion.title: Scipy constant optimization + point mutation + multi-restart GP improves exact matches from 25/50 to 29/50
assertion.statement: Combining scipy Nelder-Mead optimization of numeric constants in expression trees, a point mutation operator that perturbs constants and swaps operators in-place, and multi-restart evolution (using full 120s time budget per equation) improves exact matches from 25/50 to 29/50 (+16%) and mean R² from 0.945 to 0.968. Tier 3 improves from 4/10 to 6/10 and Tier 4 from 2/18 to 5/18. Key new solves include eq27 (RMS Speed via sqrt(k_B*T/m)), eq39 (Radioactive Decay via exp(-lambda*t)*N0), and eq44 (Boltzmann Distribution via exp(-E/(k_B*T))). The constant optimization is most impactful when the GP has found the right functional form but needs precise numeric constants — it complements linear scaling by optimizing constants embedded inside the expression structure.

changes_made: Added scipy.optimize.minimize (Nelder-Mead) to optimize all numeric constants in expression trees
Added point mutation operator that perturbs constants by small amounts or swaps operators
Refactored evolution into multi-restart strategy using full 120s time budget
Periodic constant optimization on top 2 elites every 10 generations
Final constant optimization with 500 function evaluations on best tree
Adjusted operator probabilities: crossover 0.6, subtree mutation 0.15, point mutation 0.15, reproduction 0.1
